title: Tao Te Ching 46
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 46 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 46 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: When the Tao prevails in the world, horses are used to haul manure. When the Tao is absent, war horses breed on the frontier.
